title: Change 'Pune's Most Trusted' tagline to black with professional font

requirements.text: In the Hero section, change the tagline text 'Pune's Most Trusted Real Estate Business' to deep black (#111111 or similar near-black). Replace its current font with a professional serif font (e.g., Playfair Display, already available in the project) to maintain a luxury real estate aesthetic. Ensure the text remains clearly legible against the hero background at all times.

quotes: Make that punes most trusted in black and change font keep professional one

acceptanceCriteria: The tagline 'Pune's Most Trusted Real Estate Business' in the Hero section is rendered in deep black (#111111 or near-black).
The tagline uses a professional serif font (e.g., Playfair Display) consistent with the site's luxury typography pairing.
The tagline is clearly legible against the hero background with no visibility issues.
No other text elements or sections are unintentionally altered.

constraints: Do not change any other text colors or fonts outside the Hero tagline.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the navbar company name styling (already handled in a prior feature).
Modifying the About, Services, Contact, or Footer sections.
